name: Creamy Avocado with Bacon Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons bacon; crumbled (2 strips), or 2 teaspoons imitation bacon bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit, peel, and mash the avocado with a fork.
2. Blend in the lemon juice, mixing well.
3. Add the sour cream, blending thoroughly.
4. Mix in all the remaining ingredients, blending until smooth.
5. Cover and chill.
Makes about 1 1/4 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Green bell pepper, Bok Choy, Celery, Pita bread, Radishes, Aged cheddar cheese, Cheese crackers.
